'''Elek D'cel''' was a skilled [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] diplomat who had been offworld when [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]] was [[Caamas Firestorm|destroyed]]. Returning to his homeworld, he became both founder and administrator of [[Refuge City]], an active reclamation project that had been intended to return Caamas to a livable state. Adorned in a [[Shimmersilk/Legends|shimmersilk]] noble's outfit and a full-length cloak, D'cel always had a [[Breath mask/Legends|breath mask]] at hand, as he frequently left Refuge City to take long, reflective strolls in the barrens beyond the compound. Like all Caamasi, he rarely lost his composure; but when the strain of managing every aspect of the Refuge City reclamation Project began to get to him, he had a nervous habit of twitching his nose furtively and flexing his fingers in apprehension.<ref name="CCW" />
